productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Rio Velcro Black Shoe
description: CompositionBlack lifestyle shoes with strong phylon midsole, synthetic mesh  upper, cushioned collar and tongue, synthetic and carbon rubber outsole and velcro strap for easy wearCare1. Use soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust from surface2. Do not machine washComfort and style go hand in hand is what this shoe from lotto's collection advocates. The mesh upper ensures ample ventilation for the feet, while the padded collar and tongue gives a snug Fit. The cushioned insole takes the natural curve of  the foot rendering comfort at its best. With a lightweight midsole, you  can be assured that your feet are well protected from impact, while the arched multi-directional outsole enhances grip and  support, making the shoe slip resistant. The velcro strap makes this pair of comfy shoes all the more popular as it's easy to slip in and out of them.
